Notice Of Motion To Quash Subpoena Duces Tecum And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-10-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF GALINA SIHOTA'S Motion To Quash Subpoena Duces Tecum And For Sanctions is Denied. Defendant may obtain the billing information without prejudice to the parties later disputing what is ultimately admissible or how. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Not reported = (301/PJB)
